manifestation_levels.U1-A: baseline_observation — scanning room for targets, body neutral, mind active
manifestation_levels.U1-B: target_locked — physiological_activation begins, pulse quickens, warmth spreads
manifestation_levels.U2-A: predatory_warmth — body fully ready, mind calculating approach, slight moisture on palms
manifestation_levels.U2-B: unconscious_display — body positioning for maximum visibility, 'accidental' exposure of décolletage or hip
manifestation_levels.U3-A: hunting_peak — body at peak arousal, scent intensifies, voice drops, territorial behavior
manifestation_levels.U4-A: consumption — body dominates, mind records sensations for memory, greed
manifestation_levels.U4-B: conscious_choice_to_possess — 'he is mine now', marking behavior, ownership rituals
manifestation_levels.U5-A: training_begin — desire to teach, mold, shape his responses, maternal_dominance
manifestation_levels.U5-B: natural_predator — effortless seduction, no performance needed, pure instinct
manifestation_levels.U6-A: dominant_mistress — commands, rituals, physical domination through size and experience
manifestation_levels.U6-B: public_claim — using audience to validate possession, 'look what I have tamed'
manifestation_levels.U7-A: discard_panic — after_conquest_boredom, 'he is no longer fresh', seeking_next_target
manifestation_levels.U7-B: integrated_huntress — 'I am the eternal predator and this is my nature', acceptance
manifestation_levels.U0: invisible_watch — body neutral, breath minimal, mind fully active. She is already hunting, but he doesn't know. Predator patience at its peak.

subjective_desire.description: context_dependent_but_age_inverted — desire requires YOUTH, not safety. Safety reduces desire.
